questions.name: DSA - Data structures: Stack Operation Principle
questions.questiontext: Which principle does the stack data structure follow?

questions.name: DSA - Asymptotic complexity: Big O definition
questions.questiontext: What does the "Big O" notation define in algorithms?

answers.text: The exact number of algorithm steps
The upper bound of an algorithm's runtime or memory usage in the worst case
The upper bound of an algorithm's runtime or memory usage in the best case
The upper bound of an algorithm's runtime or memory usage on average
